StringData.String: Warning
Are you sure you want to sell this room for {%sellPrice%} {COIN} ?
Sell
This is a placeholder string. If you are seeing it, there is an error (expnsn).
Place expansions to add rooms to your castle.
This is a placeholder string. If you are seeing it, there is an error (expnsn).
Buy a bedroom to add an additional worker to your castle.
This is a placeholder string. If you are seeing it, there is an error (wrkr).
A Tavern increases the happiness of workers who live nearby.
+1 Happiness to each adjacent worker room.
+1 range increase to this Tavern's happiness boost.
In the Apothecary, workers craft potions for combat.
Unlock a new potion or boost this room's productivity.
Add an extra crafting station to your Apothecary.
Unlock new potions to help you in battle.
Unlock and craft new potions to help you in battle.
In the Alchemy Lab, workers craft bombs for combat.
Unlock a new bomb or increase this room's productivity.
Add an extra crafting station to your Alchemy Lab.
Unlock new bombs to help you in battle.
Unlock and craft new bombs to help you in battle.
In the Infirmary, workers craft kits for combat.
Unlock a new kit or increase this room's productivity.
Add an extra crafting station to your Infirmary.
Unlock new kits to help you in battle.
Unlock and craft new kits to help you in battle.
This is a placeholder string. If you are seeing it, there is an error (mrkt).
The Chantry unlocks new skills! [Templar - Warrior] [Spirit - Mage] [Bard - Rogue]
This upgrade gives you an additional stat point (repeatable 3 times).
This upgrade gives you an additional skill point (repeatable 3 times).
A Furnace adds +1 Productivity to adjacent workshops.
+1 Productivity to each adjacent workshop.
+1 range increase to this Furnace's productivity boost.
Use the Treasury to send a worker to your friends' castles to collect your gold.
Treasurer collects Friend Gold +10% faster.
Increases Friend Gold earned by +10%.
Your hero's bedroom.
Increase the level cap of your hero by 10.
+1 Mana at the start of each combat.
Can be upgraded to bring more consumables into battle. Must be underground.
Upgrade the storehouse to raise your inventory cap by {%value%}.
Bring +1 consumable of each type into battle.
The Throne Room allows you to unlock new rooms for construction.
Unlock one new room for construction.
Increase the width of your castle +1 (repeatable 12 times).
The Library unlocks new skills! [Vanguard - Warrior] [Arcane - Mage] [Assassin - Rogue]
This upgrade gives you an additional starting mana in combat (repeatable 3 times).
This upgrade gives you an additional skill point (repeatable 3 times).
The Training Room unlocks new skills! [Berserker - Warrior] [Elemental - Mage] [Duelist - Rogue]
This upgrade gives you an additional stat point (repeatable 3 times).
This upgrade gives you an additional skill point (repeatable 3 times).
Display achievements and increase happiness
The Great Hall increases the number of friends you can have in your Guild. Must be aboveground.
Expand your Guild with room for 1 more friend.
Decreases Guild Members’ rest time by 10%.
You need to destroy boulders if you wish to expand underground.
Craft spell scrolls and magical items for use in battle
Redeem points to unlock additional scrolls
Purchase upgrade to increase worker capacity
Create weapon and armor coatings
Redeem points to unlock additional coatings
Purchase upgrade to increase worker capacity
PLACEHOLDER
PLACEHOLDER
PLACEHOLDER
Kitchen: Fill the orders of visiting players to make money
Stable: Send caravans to other castles in search of wealth
Imprison other player's workers to increase castle happiness
Upgrade {%roomName%}
Ravi's Upgrade
Craft {%taskTypeName%}?
Click this stool to select a crafting task for one of your workers.
Want to increase your number of work stations? Purchase my upgrade to get an additional stool.
There is no more room for additional work stations. Try upgrading your productivity to decrease crafting times.
Unlock and craft new potions to help you in battle.
Unlock new potions to help you in battle.
Start an appointment
You don't have available worker
Friend Gold
Gather {%amount%} friend gold?
You don't have available friend gold
Unlock new rooms to build in your castle
Want to expand your castle for less gold? Purchase my upgrade to increase your castle's width by 1.
Expanding castle...
There is no more space to expand your castle. Try building upwards instead.
Combat isn’t the only way to learn skills: much knowledge comes from books. Unlock 1 additional Skill Point?
You have learned all the extra skill points and mana you can from this room.
Focus your energy and become more powerful through concentration and mediation. Unlock 1 additional Skill Point?
You've learned all the extra skill and stat points from this room.
Put your skills to the test and exercise your training! Unlock 1 skill point?
You've learned all the extra skill and stat points from this room.
Unlock new skills to increase your might!
The Kennel gives you a mabari war hound you can bring into battle.
Upgrade the Kennel room to upgrade Barkspawn's stats.
Premium upgrade the Kennel room to upgrade Barkspawn's stats.
This Practice Room entices Isabela to bring her dual blades to your cause.
Upgrade the Practice Room to upgrade Isabela's stats.
Premium upgrade Practice Room to upgrade Isabela's stats.
Dragons need a lot of space. Giving one space in your castle may not be wise, but will let you bring one into battle.
Upgrade Dragon's Roost to upgrade the Fire Drake's stats.
Premium upgrade the Dragon's Roost to upgrade the Fire Drake's stats.
Shale is at peace in this room. Build it to add the rock golem to your party.
Upgrade Shale's Room to increase Shale's stats.
Premium upgrade Shale's Room to increase Shale's stats and mana.
This room allows Morrigan, a witch of the wilds, to stay with you.
Upgrade Morrigan's Room to increase Morrigan's stats.
Premium upgrade Morrigan's Room to increase Morrigan's stats.
